name: Laptop Pro – Electronics Promo Flyer
svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink" viewBox="0 0 1080 1350" width="1080" height="1350">
  <defs>
    <linearGradient id="lp-grad-bg" x1="0" y1="0" x2="1080" y2="1350" gradientUnits="userSpaceOnUse">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_BG_START"/>
      <stop offset="60%" stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_BG_MID"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_BG_END"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <linearGradient id="lp-grad-cta" x1="404" y1="0" x2="1022" y2="0" gradientUnits="userSpaceOnUse">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT_ALT"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <linearGradient id="lp-grad-img-fade" x1="0" y1="508" x2="0" y2="808" gradientUnits="userSpaceOnUse">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_BG_START" stop-opacity="0"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_BG_START" stop-opacity="0.92"/>
    </linearGradient>
    <radialGradient id="lp-grad-orb1" cx="540" cy="520" r="560" gradientUnits="userSpaceOnUse">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" stop-opacity="0.08"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" stop-opacity="0"/>
    </radialGradient>
    <radialGradient id="lp-grad-orb2" cx="900" cy="1200" r="280" gradientUnits="userSpaceOnUse">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" stop-opacity="0.04"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" stop-opacity="0"/>
    </radialGradient>
    <clipPath id="lp-img-clip">
      <rect x="140" y="148" width="800" height="660" rx="20"/>
    </clipPath>
  </defs>

  <!-- ── LAYER 1: background ── -->
  <rect width="1080" height="1350" fill="url(#lp-grad-bg)"/>

  <!-- ── LAYER 2: atmosphere orbs ── -->
  <ellipse cx="540" cy="520" rx="560" ry="460" fill="url(#lp-grad-orb1)"/>
  <ellipse cx="900" cy="1200" rx="280" ry="220" fill="url(#lp-grad-orb2)"/>

  <!-- ── LAYER 3: diagonal accent rays ── -->
  <polygon points="0,0 480,0 0,380" fill="#FFFFFF" fill-opacity="0.025"/>
  <polygon points="1080,0 1080,500 640,0" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" fill-opacity="0.04"/>
  <polygon points="0,1350 0,1020 280,1350" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" fill-opacity="0.035"/>

  <!-- ── LAYER 4: subtle grid lines ── -->
  <line x1="0" y1="270" x2="1080" y2="270" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" stroke-width="0.5" opacity="0.07"/>
  <line x1="0" y1="810" x2="1080" y2="810" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" stroke-width="0.5" opacity="0.05"/>
  <line x1="360" y1="0" x2="360" y2="1350" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" stroke-width="0.5" opacity="0.05"/>
  <line x1="720" y1="0" x2="720" y2="1350" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" stroke-width="0.5" opacity="0.05"/>

  <!-- ── LAYER 5: product image zone ── -->
  <rect x="140" y="148" width="800" height="660" rx="20" fill="#1A1A1A" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" stroke-width="1" stroke-opacity="0.15"/>
  <g clip-path="url(#lp-img-clip)">
    <image href="PLACEHOLDER_PRODUCT_IMAGE" x="140" y="148" width="800" height="660" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid meet"/>
  </g>
  <rect x="140" y="508" width="800" height="300" fill="url(#lp-grad-img-fade)"/>

  <!-- ── LAYER 6: brand logo block ── -->
  <rect x="58" y="52" width="56" height="56" rx="14" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT"/>
  <text x="86" y="88" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, sans-serif" font-size="28" font-weight="800" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ON_ACCENT" text-anchor="middle">PLACEHOLDER_BRAND_INITIAL</text>

  <!-- ── LAYER 7: store name pill ── -->
  <rect x="130" y="62" width="180" height="36" rx="8" fill="#1C1C1C" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" stroke-width="0.8" stroke-opacity="0.4"/>
  <text x="220" y="85" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif" font-size="15" font-weight="500" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" fill-opacity="0.9" text-anchor="middle" letter-spacing="1.5">PLACEHOLDER_STORE_NAME</text>

  <!-- ── LAYER 8: badge pill top-right ── -->
  <rect x="862" y="54" width="178" height="52" rx="26" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" fill-opacity="0.12" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" stroke-width="1" stroke-opacity="0.4"/>
  <text x="951" y="85" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif" font-size="17" font-weight="500" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" text-anchor="middle" letter-spacing="1">PLACEHOLDER_BADGE_TEXT</text>

  <!-- ── LAYER 9: main title ── -->
  <text x="68" y="898" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, sans-serif" font-size="108" font-weight="800" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_TITLE" text-anchor="start" letter-spacing="-2">PLACEHOLDER_TITLE_LINE1</text>
  <text x="68" y="1002" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, sans-serif" font-size="108" font-weight="800" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_TITLE" text-anchor="start" letter-spacing="-2">PLACEHOLDER_TITLE_LINE2</text>

  <!-- ── LAYER 10: accent divider ── -->
  <line x1="68" y1="1028" x2="500" y2="1028" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" stroke-width="1.5" opacity="0.5"/>

  <!-- ── LAYER 11: tagline ── -->
  <text x="68" y="1070" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif" font-size="36" font-weight="300" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" text-anchor="start" letter-spacing="2">PLACEHOLDER_TAGLINE_TEXT</text>

  <!-- ── LAYER 12: spec chips ── -->
  <rect x="68" y="1102" width="148" height="54" rx="27" fill="#1E1E1E" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" stroke-width="0.8" stroke-opacity="0.3"/>
  <text x="142" y="1127" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif" font-size="13" font-weight="500" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" fill-opacity="0.7" text-anchor="middle" letter-spacing="1">PLACEHOLDER_SPEC1_LABEL</text>
  <text x="142" y="1148" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, sans-serif" font-size="16" font-weight="700" fill="#FFFFFF" text-anchor="middle">PLACEHOLDER_SPEC1_VALUE</text>

  <rect x="232" y="1102" width="148" height="54" rx="27" fill="#1E1E1E" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" stroke-width="0.8" stroke-opacity="0.3"/>
  <text x="306" y="1127" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif" font-size="13" font-weight="500" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" fill-opacity="0.7" text-anchor="middle" letter-spacing="1">PLACEHOLDER_SPEC2_LABEL</text>
  <text x="306" y="1148" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, sans-serif" font-size="16" font-weight="700" fill="#FFFFFF" text-anchor="middle">PLACEHOLDER_SPEC2_VALUE</text>

  <rect x="396" y="1102" width="148" height="54" rx="27" fill="#1E1E1E" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" stroke-width="0.8" stroke-opacity="0.3"/>
  <text x="470" y="1127" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif" font-size="13" font-weight="500" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" fill-opacity="0.7" text-anchor="middle" letter-spacing="1">PLACEHOLDER_SPEC3_LABEL</text>
  <text x="470" y="1148" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, sans-serif" font-size="16" font-weight="700" fill="#FFFFFF" text-anchor="middle">PLACEHOLDER_SPEC3_VALUE</text>

  <rect x="560" y="1102" width="148" height="54" rx="27" fill="#1E1E1E" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" stroke-width="0.8" stroke-opacity="0.3"/>
  <text x="634" y="1127" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif" font-size="13" font-weight="500" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" fill-opacity="0.7" text-anchor="middle" letter-spacing="1">PLACEHOLDER_SPEC4_LABEL</text>
  <text x="634" y="1148" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, sans-serif" font-size="16" font-weight="700" fill="#FFFFFF" text-anchor="middle">PLACEHOLDER_SPEC4_VALUE</text>

  <!-- ── LAYER 13: price tab ── -->
  <rect x="58" y="1188" width="310" height="114" rx="57" fill="#0A0A0A" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" stroke-width="1.8"/>
  <text x="213" y="1228" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif" font-size="15" font-weight="500" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" fill-opacity="0.65" text-anchor="middle" letter-spacing="2">PLACEHOLDER_PRICE_LABEL</text>
  <text x="213" y="1278" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, sans-serif" font-size="46" font-weight="800" fill="#FFFFFF" text-anchor="middle">PLACEHOLDER_PRICE_VALUE</text>

  <!-- ── LAYER 14: CTA button ── -->
  <rect x="404" y="1192" width="618" height="106" rx="53" fill="url(#lp-grad-cta)"/>
  <text x="713" y="1254" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_DISPLAY, sans-serif" font-size="40" font-weight="800" fill="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ON_ACCENT" text-anchor="middle" letter-spacing="3">PLACEHOLDER_CTA_TEXT</text>

  <!-- ── LAYER 15: footer ── -->
  <text x="540" y="1325" font-family="PLACEHOLDER_FONT_BODY, sans-serif" font-size="15" font-weight="400" fill="#FFFFFF" fill-opacity="0.2" text-anchor="middle" letter-spacing="2">PLACEHOLDER_FOOTER_TEXT</text>

  <!-- ── LAYER 16: top accent line ── -->
  <line x1="0" y1="2" x2="1080" y2="2" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" stroke-width="3" opacity="0.7"/>

  <!-- ── LAYER 17: corner marks ── -->
  <path d="M0 88 L0 0 L88 0" fill="none" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" stroke-width="2" opacity="0.4"/>
  <path d="M1080 88 L1080 0 L992 0" fill="none" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" stroke-width="2" opacity="0.4"/>
  <path d="M0 1262 L0 1350 L88 1350" fill="none" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" stroke-width="2" opacity="0.4"/>
  <path d="M1080 1262 L1080 1350 L992 1350" fill="none" stroke="PLACEHOLDER_COLOR_ACCENT" stroke-width="2" opacity="0.4"/>
</svg>
